name: Synup Social vs. Buffer
hero_summary: Social media is tough. That’s why you need a social media management platform that inspires - not stagnates - your team. Buffer’s simplistic social media management suite is good for brands who need help with scheduling posts. But for brands who want to improve their social media presence and overall engagement, Buffer lacks key features. With a seamless content scheduling experience, Synup Social takes users from trend research to post creation to analytics with ease, telling you what content to create, when to post it, and how to improve your engagement. Brands who want to grow choose Synup Social!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Stop leaving your social media growth up to chance
section_2_summary: With limited analytics, Buffer leaves users in the dark as to their performance and avenues for future success. If you want to win customers and drive engagement, your social media strategy needs to be data-driven. But Buffer lacks robust backend analytics to execute impactful social media strategies. Let’s see exactly how Synup Social empowers brands like yours:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Your social media needs to be data-driven. Buffer’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that will help you understand which of your posts are evergreen. While Buffer provides rudimentary analytics to see your metrics at-a-glance, Synup Social breaks it down to the nitty-gritty. See which posts are driving engagement over time with interactive engagement graphs. Easily track and monitor your brand’s performance over time, giving you a clear picture of your ROI.
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: Say goodbye to writer’s block! Synup Social helps you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. While Buffer provides no content creation support, Synup inspires your top-performing posts. Synup Social’s AI-powered platform takes the hassle out of social media management. With trend forecasting, competitor tracking, and post analytics, Synup Social helps you smash your engagement goals.
section_2_step_3_summary: Your team needs to be aligned - no matter its size. You can easily collaborate with your team and your clients - at no extra cost. Buffer’s bare-bones approval workflow makes it difficult to collaborate with your team without an offline discussion. Synup Social enables content teams to cohesively manage all of their content. Team members can submit posts for approval and collaborate on posts together. Then, supervisors and clients can approve posts and provide feedback, ensuring that posts adhere to your distinct brand voice.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Buffer supports multi-location businesses, but you can’t cross-post simultaneously among locations. With Buffer, multi-location social media management is a huge time-suck. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location or multi-brand posts simultaneously. Buffer provides no support for multi-brand management. Synup Social is the clear choice for agencies and resellers managing multiple brands. We make multi-brand and multi-location management simple - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Buffer?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Buffer is renowned as a great rudimentary tool for small teams. It’s a lean, agile platform that provides all you need in a social media management tool. But what if, for the same price, you could add essential features like trend research, post inspiration, advanced analytics, and more? That sounds like a no-brainer to us. It’s time for an upgrade. See for yourself:

seo.title: Buffer Alternatives - Compare Features & Pricing
seo.description: Looking for a Buffer alternative? Synup offers a comprehensive comparison of features and pricing for the top social media management tools. Compare and choose the best fit for your business needs.
